text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
To think I'd injure myself... This doesn't bode well
at all, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Well... no, the injury itself is nothing serious. The
real problem is... it's a bad sign for the future.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
An injury is a sign of grueling ordeals to come!
This must be what the great Shiraoki is trying to
warn me about!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Just imagining what kind of disasters will befall me gives me the shivers...
choice_data_list: Well, let's take it easy for now.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Just imagining what kind of disasters will befall me gives me the shivers...
choice_data_list: Well, let's take it easy for now.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You're right. The best thing to do at times like
this is shut yourself awa—I mean, stock up on
good luck.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
In which case, let's sprinkle purifying salt and sake
all the way home for good measure!

I tell her not to overdo it, and she takes some
time to recuperate.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I definitely cannot show weakness! I'm strong and
I'll be just fine... probably!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Waaah! I don't have it in me! I'm not strong
enough to do this!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I must be dripping with bad energy by now!

All this commotion only negatively impacts her
injury, and as a result, she has to take a few days
off.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Though only barely, it's seems I've bested my own weakness.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'll get to resting up and healing my injuries! That
should ward off any bad luck!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Now all I need is a lucky charm to help speed up
my recovery!

Matikanefukukitaru is burning with determination
for our next training session and concentrates all
her energy toward recovery!
